#  Share a Custom RFI Report 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information** :
    * You can only share custom RFI reports that you or someone in the company have created. For example, you cannot share the "Questions and Responses Report" because it is NOT a custom report (it is a canned report).
    * You can share a report with any person in the Project Directory regardless of whether or not they have access to the RFIs/Reports tools.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the projects **RFIs** tool.
  2. Choose one of these options:
     * Complete the steps in [Create and View a Custom RFI Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/create-and-view-an-rfi-report).  
**OR**  
Click the custom RFI report that you want to share from the 'RFI Reports' area on the right.  
![View Custom Rfi Report](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1ccaf4c7449870c0d18c2587d8172be1/7188275881adbe7e3564027717babcd2/view-custom-rfi-report.png?fm=webp)
  3. Click **Share Report**.
  4. Select the people or distribution group(s) from the **People** list.
  5. Click **Share.**


## See Also
  * [When do the download links in emails sent from Procore expire?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-when-do-the-download-links-in-emails-sent-from-procore-expire)
  * [RFIs - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * [Edit a Custom RFI Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/edit-a-custom-rfi-report)
title: Share a Custom RFI Report
description: How to email a custom RFI report from the project's RFIs tool.
